name: Suzie Q
description:
__Height:__ 168 cm 

The female assistant to Lisa Lisa. Suzie Q is a slightly ditzy girl who worries for her friends. Evidently this carefree personality has not diminished even in the events of Stardust Crusaders, when she is shown enthusiastically recording her sightings in Japan on a camcorder when on a trip to see her daughter.   ~!She is introduced as the female assistant to Lisa Lisa. When she first appears, she is taken over by the remains of Esidisi and attacks her friends. Thanks to a combination attack by Caesar and Joseph, she is saved with only minor injury. She marries Joseph in 1939.!~
